  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Account
    Core domain entity representing a bank account.
    AccountBlockedException
    Thrown when an operation is attempted on an account whose status is AccountStatus.BLOCKED.
    AccountController
    Inbound REST adapter for account management operations.
    AccountJpaEntity
    JPA entity adapter for the accounts table.
    AccountNotFoundException
    Thrown when a requested Account cannot be located in the persistence store.
    AccountPersistenceAdapter
    Outbound persistence adapter implementing the AccountRepository port.
    AccountRepository
    Outbound port defining the persistence contract for Account entities.
    AccountResponse
    Response DTO representing a bank account returned by the REST API.
    AccountStatus
    Enumeration of the possible lifecycle states of a bank Account.
    ApiErrorResponse
    Standardised error envelope returned by the global exception handler for all non-2xx HTTP responses.
    ApiErrorResponse.FieldError
    Represents a single field-level validation violation.
    CoreBankingApplication
    Entry point for the Core Banking API application.
    CreateAccountRequest
    Request body DTO for the account creation endpoint.
    CreateAccountService
    Application service implementing the CreateAccountUseCase.
    CreateAccountUseCase
    Inbound port defining the contract for creating a new bank account.
    CreateAccountUseCase.CreateAccountCommand
    Command record encapsulating all data required to open a new bank account.
    DuplicateTransactionException
    Thrown when a transfer request arrives with an Idempotency-Key that has already been processed within its 24-hour TTL window.
    GetAccountService
    Application service implementing the GetAccountUseCase.
    GetAccountUseCase
    Inbound port defining the contract for querying account information.
    GlobalExceptionHandler
    Global exception handler that maps domain and infrastructure exceptions to standardised HTTP error responses.
    IdempotencyPort
    Outbound port defining the contract for idempotency key management.
    InsufficientFundsException
    Thrown when a debit operation cannot be completed because the source account does not hold sufficient funds to cover the requested transfer amount.
    MessagePublisherPort
    Outbound port defining the contract for publishing messages to the AMQP broker.
    Money
    Immutable value object representing a monetary amount in a specific currency.
    OpenApiConfig
    Configures the OpenAPI 3 specification exposed at /v3/api-docs and the Swagger UI available at /swagger-ui.html.
    OutboxMessage
    Domain entity representing a pending outbound AMQP message stored in the transactional outbox table.
    OutboxMessageJpaEntity
    JPA entity adapter for the outbox_messages table.
    OutboxMessagePersistenceAdapter
    Outbound persistence adapter implementing the OutboxMessageRepository port.
    OutboxMessageRepository
    Outbound port defining the persistence contract for OutboxMessage entities.
    OutboxRelayScheduler
    Scheduled background component that implements the relay half of the Transactional Outbox Pattern.
    RabbitMQConfig
    Spring configuration for all RabbitMQ topology and listener infrastructure.
    RabbitMQPublisherAdapter
    Outbound messaging adapter implementing the MessagePublisherPort using Spring AMQP's RabbitTemplate.
    RedisIdempotencyAdapter
    Outbound cache adapter implementing the IdempotencyPort using Redis.
    SpringDataAccountRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for AccountJpaEntity.
    SpringDataOutboxMessageRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for OutboxMessageJpaEntity.
    SpringDataTransactionRepository
    Spring Data JPA repository for TransactionJpaEntity.
    Transaction
    Core domain entity representing a completed or failed fund transfer between two accounts.
    TransactionEventListener
    Inbound AMQP adapter that consumes messages from the transaction event queues.
    TransactionJpaEntity
    JPA entity adapter for the transactions table.
    TransactionPersistenceAdapter
    Outbound persistence adapter implementing the TransactionRepository port.
    TransactionRepository
    Outbound port defining the persistence contract for Transaction entities.
    TransactionResponse
    Response DTO representing the result of a fund transfer returned by the REST API.
    TransactionStatus
    Enumeration of the possible outcomes of a financial Transaction.
    TransferController
    Inbound REST adapter for internal fund transfer operations.
    TransferFundsService
    Application service implementing the TransferFundsUseCase.
    TransferFundsService.TransactionPayload
    Internal DTO used for serializing transaction data to/from the outbox payload and the Redis idempotency cache.
    TransferFundsUseCase
    Inbound port defining the contract for transferring funds between two accounts.
    TransferFundsUseCase.TransferCommand
    Command record encapsulating all data required to initiate a fund transfer.
    TransferRequest
    Request body DTO for the fund transfer endpoint.
    VirtualThreadsConfig
    Configures Java 21 Virtual Threads as the default executor for Spring MVC's request handling thread pool and the application task executor.
